entity.summary: Georgia-based centralized crypto exchange offering spot trading, crypto purchases, withdrawals, and related digital-asset services.
entity.notes: The official About Us page states that Cryptal emerged in 2018 as the first Georgian crypto exchange and currently operates under Georgian VASP and Lithuanian FCIS licensing. The launch date uses a year-level approximation because the official source states only the year.

evidence.title: Cryptal About Us
evidence.notes: First-party About Us page states that Cryptal emerged in 2018 as the first Georgian crypto exchange and describes current licensing and exchange services.

evidence.title: Cryptal official platform website
evidence.notes: First-party platform remains live and exposes current crypto purchase, market, and spot-trading access.

evidence.title: Cryptal exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Discovery registry source identifies Cryptal as exchange id `cryptal`; retained as secondary registry corroboration rather than status authority.
